focus: P1 stress-test / reproducibility for sec-F2 (deny-precedence) and sec-F3 (absolute-path escape)

findingsAdjusted.description: deny-precedence runtime gap - CONFIRMED: Code uses array-order tiebreak for identical-specificity rules (line 346: specificityDelta === 0 && match.index < bestMatch.index). Test suite (permissions-gate.vitest.ts:151-177) only verifies safe ordering (deny before allow), not dangerous ordering (allow before deny). Misconfiguration with allow-first at identical specificity would incorrectly grant access.
findingsAdjusted.exploitPath: real - misconfiguration with allow-before-deny at identical specificity grants incorrect access
findingsAdjusted.counterevidenceSought: none - code behavior verified, dangerous scenario untested
findingsAdjusted.alternativeExplanation: none - code clearly uses array-order tiebreak without deny-precedence check
findingsAdjusted.downgradeTrigger: none - bug is real and untested

findingsAdjusted.description: absolute-path scope-escape - CONFIRMED: Runtime accepts absolute paths without constraining to repoRoot (line 201: path.resolve(expandHome(rawPath)) accepts absolute paths verbatim; line 232-235 only adds repo-relative candidate for matching convenience, not security constraint). No test coverage for absolute paths outside repository (permissions-gate.vitest.ts has no /etc/ or /tmp/ test cases). Paths like /etc/passwd would pass through to glob matching, enabling filesystem escape.
findingsAdjusted.exploitPath: real - absolute paths like /etc/passwd pass through to glob matching
findingsAdjusted.counterevidenceSought: none - no check rejects paths outside repoRoot
findingsAdjusted.alternativeExplanation: none - no runtime constraint to repoRoot exists
findingsAdjusted.downgradeTrigger: none - bug is real and untested

evidenceSummary.F2_code: permissions-gate.ts:346 uses array-order tiebreak: specificityDelta === 0 && match.index < bestMatch.index
evidenceSummary.F2_test: permissions-gate.vitest.ts:151-177 tests only safe ordering (deny before allow), not dangerous ordering
evidenceSummary.F3_code: permissions-gate.ts:201 accepts absolute paths verbatim; lines 232-235 no repoRoot constraint
evidenceSummary.F3_test: permissions-gate.vitest.ts has no absolute-path test cases outside repo scope
